title: Christ image of invisible God; fullness dwells
summary_text: Paul thanks God for Colossians’ faith love hope; gospel bearing fruit. We pray for knowledge of his will, strengthened with power, giving thanks—Father qualified us for inheritance; delivered from darkness; Christ firstborn all creation; head body church; reconcile all things through blood cross.
key_points: We don’t cease to pray and make requests for you.
The Father, who made us fit to be partakers of the inheritance.
He is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.
In him all the fullness was pleased to dwell.
Through him to reconcile all things to himself, whether things on the earth or in the heavens.
evidence_phrases: faith, hope, and love
qualified us to be partakers
He is the image of the invisible God
all things were created through him
In him all the fullness was pleased to dwell
through the blood of his cross

title: Fullness in Christ; raised with him
summary_text: I want hearts encouraged—riches of assurance; all treasures wisdom knowledge hidden in Christ. See no one spoil through philosophy—walk in him rooted built up. Circumcision made without hands; buried raised with him; nailed handwriting to cross; let no one judge in food festival new moon Sabbath—shadow; substance is Christ’s.
key_points: That their hearts may be encouraged, being knit together in love.
All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
As therefore you received Christ Jesus the Lord, walk in him.
You were buried with him in baptism, in whom you were also raised with him.
He wiped out the handwriting in ordinances which was against us; and he has taken it out of the way, nailing it to the cross.
evidence_phrases: treasures of wisdom and knowledge
walk in him
you were buried with him
you were also raised with him
nailing it to the cross
a shadow of the things to come; but the body is Christ’s

title: Seek above; put off old; word of Christ
summary_text: If raised with Christ, seek things above where Christ seated—life hidden with God. Put to death earthly members; put off old man; renewed knowledge; put on compassionate heart, love, peace of Christ rules; word of Christ dwell richly.
key_points: If then you were raised together with Christ, seek the things that are above.
For you died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
Put to death therefore your members which are on the earth.
Put on therefore, as God’s chosen ones, holy and beloved, a heart of compassion.
Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly.
evidence_phrases: seek the things that are above
your life is hidden with Christ
Put to death therefore your members
Put on … a heart of compassion
Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly
whatever you do, do all in the name of the Lord Jesus

title: Masters, prayer, faithful workers
summary_text: Masters give bondservants what is just and equal. Continue steadfastly in prayer with thanksgiving; pray for Paul. Walk in wisdom toward outsiders; speech seasoned with salt. Tychicus, Onesimus, fellow workers greet; grace be with you.
key_points: Masters, give to your servants that which is just and equal.
Continue steadfastly in prayer, watching in it with thanksgiving.
Walk in wisdom toward those who are outside.
Let your speech always be with grace, seasoned with salt.
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.
evidence_phrases: give to your servants that which is just
Continue steadfastly in prayer
Walk in wisdom
Let your speech always be with grace
Epaphras … always striving for you in his prayers
Grace … be with you
